ocr_findings.description: The 知的財産権の分類 hierarchical tree diagram (showing 著作権→本など, 産業財産権→特許権/実用新案権/意匠権/商標権, その他の権利→営業秘密など) is replaced by a single img placeholder 'img-0.jpeg'. The branching structure and all child labels are lost from the OCR text.
試験にはコレが出る! mascot box text and the 'もう少し詳しく！無方式主義' sidebar are both captured correctly.

reviewer_notes: Page continues Lesson 02-01 with the 知的財産権 classification tree, 無方式主義 sidebar, and 著作権法保護リスト. The tree diagram is the significant loss — its textual content (特許権, 実用新案権, 意匠権, 商標権 with 産業財産権 grouping) is completely absent from OCR output. Body paragraphs and bullet list are faithfully captured.
